description_long: This is a rectangular dining table with a flat, smooth surface and four straight legs, accompanied by four matching chairs and a single round stool. The chairs feature a geometric cutout design on the backrests, adding a modern touch to the ensemble. The entire set is finished in a dark, glossy color, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The table and seating are constructed from what appears to be painted or lacquered wood or metal, with the stool having a simple, round seat and three legs. The set is designed for communal use, likely accommodating up to five people comfortably. Its robust build and minimalist design make it suitable for urban environments such as public parks, outdoor cafes, or communal dining areas.
description: A modern rectangular table set with four matching chairs and a round stool, all in a dark, glossy finish. The set features geometric chair backs and a sleek, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the table with two chairs on each side and a round stool centered in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular tabletop, two chairs on each long side, and the round stool at the end.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the round stool in the foreground and the geometric chair backs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the rectangular table, two chairs on each side, and the round stool at the far end.
